mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ops_order_inventory_log( order_id, order_item,inventory_id, qty, inventory_table_type,cre_time, modelno, order_qty) values
( #{item.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.inventoryTableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.orderQty,jdbcType=INTEGER})
